title: fumana thymifolia var. barrelieri
intro: Fumana thymifolia var. barrelieri, also known as the Barrelier's fumana or yellow rockrose, is a variety of flowering plant in the Cistaceae family. It is primarily found in the Mediterranean region and has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Fumana thymifolia var. barrelieri is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can also be used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and combat infections.
